sentences.arabic: الصَّلَاةُ هِيَ الرُّكْنُ الثَّانِي مِنْ أَرْكَانِ الْإِسْلَامِ الْخَمْسَةِ الْعَظِيمَةِ.
sentences.translation: Namaz je drugi od pet velikih stubova islama.
sentences.translationEn: Prayer is the second of the five great pillars of Islam.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ: «الصَّلَوَاتُ الْخَمْسُ...
sentences.translation: Poslanik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, je rekao: 'Pet dnevnih namaza...
sentences.translationEn: The Prophet (PBUH) said: 'The five daily prayers...

sentences.arabic: كَفَّارَاتٌ لِمَا بَيْنَهُنَّ» [رَوَاهُ مُسْلِمٌ فِي كِتَابِ الطَّهَارَةِ، حَدِيثُ رَقْمِ ٢٣٣].
sentences.translation: su iskup za grijehe počinjene između njih' [Muslim].
sentences.translationEn: are expiations for what is between them' [Muslim].

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ الصَّلَوَاتُ تُطَهِّرُ قَلْبَ الْمُسْلِمِ مِنَ الذُّنُوبِ وَالْخَطَايَا كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: Ovi namazi svakodnevno čiste srce muslimana od grijeha i pogrešaka.
sentences.translationEn: These prayers purify the Muslim's heart from sins and mistakes every day.

sentences.arabic: هِيَ صِلَةٌ مُبَاشِرَةٌ بَيْنَ الْعَبْدِ وَخَالِقِهِ فِي كُلِّ وَقْتٍ وَحِينٍ.
sentences.translation: To je direktna veza između roba i njegovog Stvoritelja u svakom trenutku.
sentences.translationEn: It is a direct connection between the servant and his Creator at all times.

sentences.arabic: الْمُحَافَظَةُ عَلَى الصَّلَاةِ فِي وَقْتِهَا تَجْلِبُ الرَّاحَةَ وَالسَّكِينَةَ لِلنَّفْسِ.
sentences.translation: Redovno obavljanje namaza u njegovo vrijeme donosi odmor i smiraj duši.
sentences.translationEn: Maintaining prayer on time brings comfort and tranquility to the soul.
